title: eroteum macrophyllum
side_effects: Eroteum macrophyllum can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can cause stomach pain, diarrhea, and vomiting. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxins can also lead to headaches, fatigue, and respiratory issues. Improper use of eroteum macrophyllum can exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as kidney or liver disease, and interact with medications in unpredictable ways.
